title: How Thorne drove 63% growth in DTC sales after a brand awareness push
description: Thorne's chief growth officer, Mary Beech, explained in a conversation at the Modern Retail Marketing Summit how the company has moved to a full-funnel marketing approach with new storytelling, channels and AI tools.
title_en: Thorne Achieves 63% DTC Sales Growth Through AI-Enhanced Full-Funnel Marketing Strategy
summary_ko: 건강보조식품 브랜드 Thorne이 브랜드 인지도 향상 캠페인을 통해 DTC 매출 63% 성장을 달성했습니다. 회사는 새로운 스토리텔링, 채널, AI 도구를 활용한 풀 퍼널 마케팅 접근법으로 전환했습니다. 최고성장책임자 Mary Beech가 Modern Retail Marketing Summit에서 이러한 성과를 설명했습니다.
summary_en: Health supplement brand Thorne achieved 63% growth in DTC sales following a brand awareness campaign. The company shifted to a full-funnel marketing approach incorporating new storytelling, channels, and AI tools. Chief Growth Officer Mary Beech shared these results at the Modern Retail Marketing Summit.
so_what_ko: AI 도구를 활용한 풀 퍼널 마케팅 전략이 DTC 브랜드의 매출 성장에 직접적인 효과를 입증했으므로, LG D2C 조직도 유사한 AI 기반 통합 마케팅 접근법을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: The proven effectiveness of AI-enhanced full-funnel marketing in driving significant DTC sales growth suggests LG's D2C organization should evaluate similar integrated AI-based marketing strategies.
key_points: Thorne achieved 63% DTC sales growth through brand awareness campaign
Company adopted full-funnel marketing approach with AI tools integration
Strategy included new storytelling methods and channel diversification
Results presented at industry summit demonstrate scalable success model
one_line_insight_ko: AI 도구를 통합한 풀 퍼널 마케팅 전략이 DTC 매출 급성장의 핵심 동력으로 입증되었습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-integrated full-funnel marketing strategy proves to be a key driver for explosive DTC sales growth.

title: Microsoft updates ads platform for AI-driven discovery
description:
Microsoft is adding tools to help brands stay visible as AI agents take a bigger role in search, shopping, and decision-making.
The post Microsoft updates ads platform for AI-driven discovery appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Microsoft Enhances Ads Platform with AI-Driven Discovery Tools for Agent-Based Commerce
summary_ko: 마이크로소프트가 AI 에이전트가 검색, 쇼핑, 의사결정에서 더 큰 역할을 담당하는 상황에 대비해 광고 플랫폼을 업데이트했습니다. 새로운 도구들은 브랜드가 AI 기반 환경에서도 가시성을 유지할 수 있도록 지원합니다. 이는 AI 에이전트 시대의 마케팅 전략 변화를 반영합니다.
summary_en: Microsoft updated its advertising platform to help brands maintain visibility as AI agents take larger roles in search, shopping, and decision-making. The new tools are designed to support brand presence in AI-driven environments. This reflects the evolving marketing landscape in the age of AI agents.
so_what_ko: AI 에이전트 기반 상거래 환경에서 브랜드 가시성 확보가 중요해지므로, LG는 마이크로소프트와 같은 플랫폼의 새로운 AI 도구를 활용한 마케팅 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As brand visibility in AI agent-driven commerce becomes crucial, LG should develop marketing strategies leveraging new AI tools from platforms like Microsoft.
key_points: Microsoft adds AI-driven discovery tools to advertising platform
Tools designed to maintain brand visibility in AI agent environments
Addresses shift toward AI-mediated search and shopping behaviors
Reflects platform evolution for agentic commerce landscape
one_line_insight_ko: AI 에이전트 시대에 브랜드 가시성 확보를 위한 플랫폼 도구 진화가 가속화되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Platform tool evolution for brand visibility in the AI agent era is accelerating rapidly.

title: Marketing strategists search for a solution to AI’s all-too predictable outputs
description: Marketing strategists embracing tools are finding AI’s penchant for predictability puts a ceiling on their usefulness. But the search for a solution prompts questions over how much they should rely on the machines.
title_en: Marketing Strategists Grapple with AI's Predictability Problem in Creative Outputs
summary_ko: 마케팅 전략가들이 AI 도구를 도입하면서 AI의 예측 가능한 결과물이 활용도에 한계를 가한다는 문제를 발견했습니다. 이러한 예측 가능성 문제의 해결책을 찾는 과정에서 기계에 얼마나 의존해야 하는지에 대한 의문이 제기됩니다. AI 도구의 유용성과 창의성 사이의 균형점을 찾는 것이 과제입니다.
summary_en: Marketing strategists adopting AI tools find that AI's predictable outputs create limitations on their usefulness. The search for solutions to this predictability issue raises questions about appropriate reliance on machines. Finding the balance between AI utility and creativity remains a key challenge.
so_what_ko: AI 마케팅 도구의 예측 가능성 문제는 창의적 차별화를 저해할 수 있으므로, LG는 AI를 보조 도구로 활용하되 인간의 창의성과 전략적 사고를 중심으로 하는 하이브리드 접근법을 채택해야 합니다.
so_what_en: The predictability problem in AI marketing tools can hinder creative differentiation, so LG should adopt a hybrid approach using AI as a supportive tool while centering human creativity and strategic thinking.
key_points: AI tools show predictable outputs limiting creative marketing potential
Marketing strategists question optimal level of machine dependence
Balance between AI efficiency and human creativity becomes critical
Industry seeks solutions to overcome AI predictability constraints
one_line_insight_ko: AI 마케팅 도구의 예측 가능성 문제는 인간-AI 협업 모델의 재정의를 요구합니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI marketing tools' predictability problem demands a redefinition of human-AI collaboration models.

title: Retailers roll out fuel perks as consumers look for relief from $4 gas amid U.S.-Iran war
description: As gas prices climb, companies are rolling out limited-time fuel perks to attract cost-conscious shoppers, boost foot traffic and provide some relief at the pump.
title_en: Retailers Launch Fuel Perks Programs to Attract Cost-Conscious Consumers Amid Rising Gas Prices
summary_ko: 미국-이란 전쟁으로 인해 유가가 4달러까지 오르면서 소매업체들이 연료 혜택 프로그램을 출시하고 있습니다. 이러한 프로그램은 비용에 민감한 소비자를 유치하고 매장 방문을 늘리며 주유소에서 부담을 덜어주는 것을 목표로 합니다. 유가 상승기에 소매업체들이 고객 유치를 위해 한시적 혜택을 제공하는 전략입니다.
summary_en: As gas prices climb to $4 amid the U.S.-Iran war, retailers are rolling out fuel perks programs. These initiatives aim to attract cost-conscious shoppers, boost foot traffic, and provide relief at gas pumps. Retailers are implementing limited-time benefits as a customer acquisition strategy during rising fuel costs.
so_what_ko: 경제적 압박 상황에서 소매업체의 연료 혜택 프로그램은 고객 유치 전략의 좋은 사례이므로, LG D2C는 유사한 상황에서 비용 절감 혜택을 통한 고객 충성도 프로그램을 검토할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Retailers' fuel perks programs during economic pressure provide a good example of customer acquisition strategy, suggesting LG D2C could consider cost-saving benefit programs for customer loyalty in similar situations.
key_points: Gas prices reach $4 due to U.S.-Iran war driving consumer cost concerns
Retailers launch limited-time fuel perks to attract price-sensitive customers
Strategy aims to increase foot traffic and provide consumer relief
Economic pressure prompts innovative customer acquisition approaches
one_line_insight_ko: 경제적 어려움 속에서 소매업체의 비용 절감 혜택 프로그램이 고객 유치의 핵심 전략으로 부상했습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Cost-saving benefit programs have emerged as key customer acquisition strategies for retailers during economic hardship.

title: B2B Ecommerce Powers Africa Retail
description:
In much of Africa, consumer retail revolves around physical mom-and-pop shops, kiosks, and market stalls.
The post B2B Ecommerce Powers Africa Retail appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
title_en: B2B E-commerce Emerges as Key Driver of African Retail Transformation
summary_ko: 아프리카 대부분 지역의 소비자 소매업은 전통적인 동네 상점, 키오스크, 시장 좌판을 중심으로 이루어집니다. B2B 전자상거래가 아프리카 소매업계의 핵심 동력으로 부상하고 있습니다. 물리적 소매 인프라가 발달한 지역에서 디지털 B2B 솔루션이 변화를 이끌고 있습니다.
summary_en: Consumer retail in much of Africa revolves around traditional mom-and-pop shops, kiosks, and market stalls. B2B e-commerce is emerging as a key driver powering African retail transformation. Digital B2B solutions are leading change in regions with established physical retail infrastructure.
so_what_ko: 아프리카의 B2B 전자상거래 성장은 신흥 시장에서의 디지털 인프라 구축 기회를 시사하므로, LG는 아프리카 시장 진출 시 B2B 플랫폼을 통한 유통 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Africa's B2B e-commerce growth indicates digital infrastructure opportunities in emerging markets, suggesting LG should consider B2B platform distribution strategies when entering African markets.
key_points: African retail dominated by traditional mom-and-pop shops and market stalls
B2B e-commerce becoming key transformation driver in African retail
Digital solutions targeting existing physical retail infrastructure
Emerging market presents opportunities for B2B platform development
one_line_insight_ko: 아프리카의 전통적 소매 구조에서 B2B 전자상거래가 디지털 변혁의 핵심 촉매 역할을 하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: B2B e-commerce serves as a key catalyst for digital transformation within Africa's traditional retail structure.

title: Primark to be spun off into stand-alone company
description: Parent company Associated British Foods plans to separate the fashion retailer from its food business before the end of 2027.
title_en: Primark to spin off into standalone company from Associated British Foods
summary_ko: 패션 리테일러 프라이마크가 모회사 Associated British Foods로부터 2027년 말까지 분사될 예정입니다. 이는 식품 사업과 패션 사업의 분리를 통한 구조조정의 일환입니다. 독립된 의류 전문 기업으로 새로운 성장 동력을 확보하려는 전략으로 보입니다.
summary_en: Fashion retailer Primark will be spun off from parent company Associated British Foods as a standalone company by the end of 2027. This separation aims to divide the food business from the fashion retail operations. The move represents a strategic restructuring to focus on specialized business areas.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드에게는 독립적인 전문 기업 구조가 민첩한 의사결정과 브랜드 집중도를 높일 수 있음을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: This demonstrates how focused, standalone structures can enable more agile decision-making and brand concentration for D2C operations.
key_points: Primark separating from Associated British Foods by end of 2027
Strategic split between food and fashion retail operations
Transition to standalone apparel company structure
one_line_insight_ko: 패션 리테일러의 독립 분사는 전문화된 D2C 운영 구조의 중요성을 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: Fashion retailer spinoffs highlight the importance of specialized D2C operational structures.

title: Amazon allegedly pushed vendors to set higher prices at Target, Walmart
description: California's attorney general office claims the e-commerce giant worked with brands, including Levi’s and Hanes, to raise prices on products on competitor websites.
title_en: Amazon allegedly pressured vendors to raise prices at Target and Walmart
summary_ko: 캘리포니아 주 검찰총장실이 아마존이 리바이스, 헤인즈 등 브랜드와 협력해 경쟁사 웹사이트에서 가격을 인상하도록 압박했다고 주장했습니다. 이는 전자상거래 거대기업의 반경쟁적 행위에 대한 법적 조사의 일환입니다. 아마존의 시장 지배력 남용 가능성에 대한 우려가 제기되고 있습니다.
summary_en: California's attorney general office alleges Amazon worked with brands like Levi's and Hanes to push higher prices on competitor websites including Target and Walmart. This represents part of legal investigations into anti-competitive practices by the e-commerce giant. The allegations raise concerns about Amazon's potential abuse of market dominance.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 플랫폼 의존도를 줄이고 다양한 판매 채널에서 독립적인 가격 정책을 유지해야 할 필요성이 증가합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to reduce platform dependency and maintain independent pricing strategies across diverse sales channels.
key_points: Amazon allegedly pressured vendors for competitor price increases
Investigation involves major brands like Levi's and Hanes
Anti-competitive practices under legal scrutiny
one_line_insight_ko: 플랫폼 지배력 남용 리스크는 D2C 브랜드의 채널 다각화 전략을 가속화합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Platform dominance abuse risks accelerate D2C brands' channel diversification strategies.

title: Home Depot acquires Simpl Automation for fulfillment operations
description:
The Home Depot announced its acquisition of warehouse technology company Simpl Automation. The retailer did not disclose terms of the deal in its April 15 press release. However, Home Depot shared that Simpl’s expertise in automation and technology will make its same-day and next-day fulfillment faster and more efficient. Currently, The Home Depot ranks fourth […]
The post Home Depot acquires Simpl Automation for fulfillment operations appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Home Depot acquires Simpl Automation to enhance fulfillment operations
summary_ko: 홈디포가 창고 기술 회사 Simpl Automation을 인수했다고 발표했습니다. 거래 조건은 공개되지 않았지만, Simpl의 자동화 기술 전문성이 당일 배송과 익일 배송을 더욱 빠르고 효율적으로 만들 것이라고 밝혔습니다. 이는 풀필먼트 운영 최적화를 위한 기술 투자 확대의 일환입니다.
summary_en: Home Depot announced the acquisition of warehouse technology company Simpl Automation, though deal terms were not disclosed. The retailer stated that Simpl's automation and technology expertise will make same-day and next-day fulfillment faster and more efficient. This represents expanded technology investment for fulfillment operations optimization.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 배송 경쟁력 확보를 위해 창고 자동화 기술 투자와 전문 업체 파트너십을 적극 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should actively consider warehouse automation technology investments and specialized vendor partnerships to secure delivery competitiveness.
key_points: Home Depot acquires warehouse automation company Simpl
Focus on improving same-day and next-day fulfillment speed
Strategic investment in fulfillment technology capabilities
one_line_insight_ko: 대형 리테일러의 풀필먼트 자동화 투자는 D2C 기업의 배송 기술 혁신 필요성을 부각시킵니다.
one_line_insight_en: Major retailers' fulfillment automation investments highlight D2C companies' need for delivery technology innovation.

title: VTEX announces AI-focused commerce suite, platform upgrades
description:
Ecommerce platform technology provider VTEX has announced it would release a commerce suite for its merchants that it said would showcase artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities. VTEX said it is “placing AI at the core of its architecture.” It said its update positions it to automate operations, personalize customer experiences and expand ad monetization by using […]
The post VTEX announces AI-focused commerce suite, platform upgrades appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: VTEX launches AI-native commerce suite with platform upgrades
summary_ko: 이커머스 플랫폼 기술 제공업체 VTEX가 인공지능 기능을 강조한 커머스 스위트를 출시한다고 발표했습니다. VTEX는 AI를 아키텍처의 핵심에 배치하여 운영 자동화, 고객 경험 개인화, 광고 수익화 확대를 목표로 합니다. 이는 AI 기반 커머스 플랫폼으로의 전환을 의미합니다.
summary_en: Ecommerce platform technology provider VTEX announced the release of a commerce suite showcasing artificial intelligence capabilities. VTEX is placing AI at the core of its architecture to automate operations, personalize customer experiences, and expand ad monetization. This represents a transition to AI-native commerce platform positioning.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 네이티브 플랫폼 활용을 통해 개인화된 고객 경험과 운영 효율성을 동시에 확보할 수 있는 기회를 얻습니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies can leverage AI-native platforms to simultaneously achieve personalized customer experiences and operational efficiency.
key_points: VTEX launches AI-focused commerce suite for merchants
AI positioned at core of platform architecture
Focus on automation, personalization, and ad monetization
one_line_insight_ko: AI 네이티브 커머스 플랫폼은 D2C 브랜드의 개인화와 자동화를 동시에 실현하는 핵심 인프라가 됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-native commerce platforms become essential infrastructure enabling simultaneous personalization and automation for D2C brands.

title: The future of generative engine optimization: How 5 GEO trends reshape loop and inbound marketing
description: GEO has found its place in the search landscape, and it’s reasonable to think that the future of generative engine optimization is guaranteed. According to Datos’s State of Search report, Q4-2025 saw some interesting changes. For the first time, AI tools had a consistent 1.31% to 1.34% of visits in the U.S. In previous quarters and reports, traffic to AI tools was growing. This stability in traffic suggests that AI search tools may have found their place in the wider search landscape.
title_en: Five GEO trends reshape the future of generative engine optimization and inbound marketing
summary_ko: 생성형 엔진 최적화(GEO)가 검색 환경에서 자리를 잡으며 인바운드 마케팅의 미래를 재편하고 있습니다. Datos의 검색 현황 보고서에 따르면 2025년 4분기 AI 도구 방문량이 1.31-1.34%로 안정화되었습니다. 이는 AI 검색 도구가 광범위한 검색 환경에서 확고한 위치를 찾았음을 시사합니다.
summary_en: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) has established its position in the search landscape and is reshaping the future of inbound marketing. According to Datos's State of Search report, Q4-2025 saw AI tools stabilize at 1.31-1.34% of visits in the U.S. This stability suggests AI search tools have found their established place in the broader search ecosystem.
so_what_ko: D2C 마케터들은 전통적인 SEO와 함께 GEO 전략을 개발하여 AI 기반 검색 환경에서의 가시성을 확보해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C marketers must develop GEO strategies alongside traditional SEO to secure visibility in AI-driven search environments.
key_points: GEO emerging as key component of search marketing strategy
AI search tools showing traffic stability at 1.31-1.34%
Five trends reshaping inbound marketing approach
one_line_insight_ko: GEO는 AI 검색 시대의 새로운 마케팅 필수 역량으로 D2C 브랜드 가시성 전략을 혁신합니다.
one_line_insight_en: GEO emerges as essential marketing capability for the AI search era, revolutionizing D2C brand visibility strategies.

title: Before you buy another AI tool, ask these 5 questions
description:
Buying AI is easy. Making it work across data, workflows, and teams is not. Here’s how to evaluate tools before you invest.
The post Before you buy another AI tool, ask these 5 questions appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Five Critical Questions to Ask Before Buying AI Marketing Tools
summary_ko: AI 마케팅 도구 구매 시 데이터, 워크플로우, 팀 통합 관점에서 평가해야 할 5가지 핵심 질문을 제시했습니다. AI 도구 구매는 쉽지만 실제 마케팅 조직에서 효과적으로 활용하는 것은 복잡한 과제입니다. 투자 전 도구의 실용성과 조직 적합성을 체계적으로 평가하는 프레임워크가 필요합니다.
summary_en: MarTech presents five essential questions marketers should ask before investing in AI tools, focusing on data integration, workflow compatibility, and team adoption. While purchasing AI tools is straightforward, making them work effectively across marketing organizations presents significant challenges. A systematic evaluation framework is needed to assess tool practicality and organizational fit before investment.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI 마케팅 도구 도입 시 기존 데이터 인프라와 마케팅 워크플로우와의 호환성을 우선 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should prioritize evaluating data infrastructure compatibility and marketing workflow integration when adopting AI marketing tools.
key_points: AI tool evaluation requires systematic approach focusing on data, workflows, and teams
Purchase decisions should consider organizational integration challenges
Framework provided for assessing tool practicality before investment
one_line_insight_ko: AI 마케팅 도구의 성공은 구매가 아닌 조직 내 통합 실행력에 달려있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Success with AI marketing tools depends on organizational integration execution, not just the purchase decision.

title: EXCLUSIVE: Mars Petcare’s CGO Najoh Tita-Reid is Exiting to Pursue Career in AI
description: The executive, who helped reconfigure Mars’ agency roster and implement AI-focused marketing frameworks, will depart in Q4.
title_en: Mars Petcare CGO Exits to Pursue AI Career, Signals Marketing Leadership Shift
summary_ko: Mars Petcare의 최고성장책임자(CGO) Najoh Tita-Reid가 AI 분야 커리어를 위해 4분기에 퇴사할 예정입니다. 그는 Mars의 에이전시 로스터 재구성과 AI 중심 마케팅 프레임워크 구축을 주도했습니다. 이는 마케팅 리더십이 AI 전문성 중심으로 변화하고 있음을 시사합니다.
summary_en: Mars Petcare's Chief Growth Officer Najoh Tita-Reid is departing in Q4 to pursue a career in AI. She led the reconfiguration of Mars' agency roster and implementation of AI-focused marketing frameworks. This signals a broader shift in marketing leadership toward AI expertise.
so_what_ko: 마케팅 리더들이 AI 전문성을 위해 이직하는 트렌드는 LG D2C도 AI 역량을 갖춘 마케팅 리더십 확보가 시급함을 의미합니다.
so_what_en: The trend of marketing leaders departing for AI expertise indicates LG D2C needs to urgently secure AI-capable marketing leadership.
key_points: Senior marketing executive leaving established brand for AI career
Mars successfully implemented AI-focused marketing frameworks
Indicates growing demand for AI expertise in marketing leadership
one_line_insight_ko: AI 전문성을 가진 마케팅 리더에 대한 수요가 급증하며 인재 경쟁이 치열해지고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Demand for AI-skilled marketing leaders is intensifying talent competition across industries.

title: Uber, Time and eos are 2026 Future Leader Awards finalists
description: The Future Leader Awards, presented by Digiday, Glossy and Modern Retail, recognize the next generation of leaders making a significant impact in their industry, with 10 years of experience or less.  This year’s finalists represent a new wave of leadership defined by forward-looking strategy and cross-functional execution. Their work is grounded in measurable outcomes, delivering […]
title_en: Uber, Time, and eos Named as 2026 Future Leader Awards Finalists
summary_ko: Digiday의 2026 Future Leader Awards에서 Uber, Time, eos가 최종 후보로 선정되었습니다. 이 상은 10년 이하 경험을 가진 차세대 리더들을 인정하는 프로그램입니다. 올해 후보들은 미래 지향적 전략과 크로스펑셔널 실행력으로 정의되는 새로운 리더십을 대표합니다.
summary_en: Uber, Time, and eos have been named finalists for Digiday's 2026 Future Leader Awards. The program recognizes next-generation leaders with 10 years or less experience making significant industry impact. This year's finalists represent new leadership defined by forward-looking strategy and cross-functional execution.
so_what_ko: 차세대 리더십이 크로스펑셔널 실행력을 중시하는 만큼, LG D2C도 부서 간 협업 능력을 갖춘 젊은 리더 발굴과 육성에 투자해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As next-generation leadership emphasizes cross-functional execution, LG D2C should invest in identifying and developing young leaders with inter-departmental collaboration skills.
key_points: Recognition program highlights emerging leadership talent
Focus on leaders with forward-looking strategy and cross-functional skills
Industry emphasis on next-generation leadership capabilities
one_line_insight_ko: 미래 리더십의 핵심은 크로스펑셔널 실행력과 전략적 사고의 결합입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Future leadership success combines cross-functional execution with strategic thinking capabilities.

title: ‘It’s like getting Taylor Swift tickets’: Brands rush to request tariff refunds, with some snags
description: The tariff refunds process has been smoother for some folks than others, according to conversations Modern Retail had with half a dozen brands and entrepreneurs.
title_en: Brands Face Challenges in Tariff Refund Process Despite High Demand
summary_ko: 관세 환급 신청이 테일러 스위프트 티켓 구매처럼 경쟁이 치열하다고 브랜드들이 표현했습니다. Modern Retail이 6개 브랜드와 기업가들과 나눈 대화에 따르면 환급 과정이 일부에게는 원활했지만 다른 이들에게는 어려움이 있었습니다. 브랜드들이 관세 환급을 적극적으로 요청하고 있는 상황입니다.
summary_en: Brands describe the tariff refund request process as competitive as getting Taylor Swift tickets. According to Modern Retail conversations with six brands and entrepreneurs, the refund process has been smooth for some but challenging for others. Brands are actively rushing to request tariff refunds amid high demand.
so_what_ko: 관세 정책 변화가 D2C 브랜드 수익성에 직접적 영향을 미치므로, LG D2C는 관세 환급 절차를 체계화하고 정부 정책 변화에 신속 대응할 수 있는 시스템을 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As tariff policy changes directly impact D2C brand profitability, LG D2C should systematize refund procedures and build systems for rapid response to government policy changes.
key_points: High competition for tariff refund requests among brands
Mixed experiences with refund process efficiency
Direct impact on brand operations and profitability
one_line_insight_ko: 정부 정책 변화에 대한 신속한 대응 능력이 D2C 브랜드의 경쟁력을 좌우합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Rapid response capability to government policy changes determines D2C brand competitiveness.

title: Favorite Daughter, eos and Sol de Janeiro are 2026 Future Leader Awards finalists
description: The Future Leader Awards, presented by Digiday, Glossy and Modern Retail, recognize the next generation of leaders making a significant impact in their industry, with 10 years of experience or less.
title_en: Favorite Daughter, eos, and Sol de Janeiro Named Future Leader Awards Finalists
summary_ko: Favorite Daughter, eos, Sol de Janeiro가 2026 Future Leader Awards 최종 후보로 선정되었습니다. Digiday, Glossy, Modern Retail이 공동 주최하는 이 상은 10년 이하 경험을 가진 차세대 리더들을 인정합니다. 업계에 큰 영향을 미치는 젊은 리더들을 발굴하는 프로그램입니다.
summary_en: Favorite Daughter, eos, and Sol de Janeiro have been named finalists for the 2026 Future Leader Awards. The awards, presented by Digiday, Glossy, and Modern Retail, recognize next-generation leaders with 10 years or less experience. The program identifies young leaders making significant industry impact.
so_what_ko: 뷰티와 패션 D2C 브랜드들이 차세대 리더십에서 두각을 나타내고 있어, LG D2C도 이들 브랜드의 리더십 전략과 혁신 사례를 벤치마킹해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As beauty and fashion D2C brands excel in next-generation leadership, LG D2C should benchmark their leadership strategies and innovation cases.
key_points: Beauty and fashion D2C brands recognized for leadership excellence
Focus on next-generation leaders with significant industry impact
Multi-publication recognition program highlighting emerging talent
one_line_insight_ko: 뷰티와 패션 D2C 브랜드들이 차세대 리더십 혁신을 주도하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Beauty and fashion D2C brands are leading next-generation leadership innovation.
